description: A project plan defines the phases, tasks, timeline, resource allocation, and dependencies for executing an engagement or initiative.
distinguishing_characteristics: Contains phases or work breakdown structure
Defines tasks with owners, durations, or dates
Includes dependencies between tasks or phases
References resource allocation or team roles
May include Gantt chart descriptions or milestone tables

fields.name: phases
fields.description: Project phases with names, durations, and key activities

fields.name: team_roles
fields.description: Team members or roles and their responsibilities

fields.name: risks
fields.description: Identified risks with likelihood and impact

fields.name: success_criteria
fields.description: Criteria for project success or acceptance

fields.name: communication_plan
fields.description: Cadence and channels for status reporting
